basics.name: Zihao Wang
basics.label: Undergraduate Student
basics.summary: B.Sc. candidate in Psychology (Qiushi Honor's Program) at Zhejiang University, with research interests in consciousness, mental imagery, and aphantasia. Visiting student at Pembroke College, University of Oxford.
